ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "avg_area_income" REAL /* Average income of households in the area */,
  "avg_area_house_age" REAL /* Average age of houses in the area */,
  "avg_area_number_of_rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms in houses in the area */,
  "avg_area_number_of_bedrooms" REAL /* Average number of bedrooms in houses in the area */,
  "area_population" REAL /* Population of the area */,
  "area_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "area_median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the area */,
  "area_median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the area */,
  "area_crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "area_school_rating" REAL /* School rating in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area where the property is located */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property has been on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area the trend is for */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend is for */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the area on the trend date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in average price from the previous trend date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted average price of properties in the area on the prediction date */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
